blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
